summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW Birth Chart and Kundali Milan features plus existing horoscope functionality. Backend APIs 100% successful (13/13 tests), frontend has new premium features properly integrated.

integration_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /dashboard URL occasionally doesn't preserve zodiac sign context, but sign selection and manual navigation works

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Zodiac signs API returns all 12 signs with metadata
GPT-5.2 horoscope generation (daily/weekly/monthly)
Horoscope caching and error handling
NEW: Birth profile creation API (/api/profile/birth)
NEW: Birth profile retrieval API
NEW: Birth profiles listing API
NEW: Birth chart generation API with GPT-5.2 (/api/birthchart/generate)
NEW: Kundali Milan generation API with GPT-5.2 (/api/kundali-milan/generate)
NEW: Kundali Milan compatibility scoring (0-36 Ashtakoot system)
Landing page with all 12 zodiac signs
Zodiac sign selection with visual feedback
Dashboard with Aries sign information display
NEW: Birth Chart tab visible and clickable
NEW: Kundali Milan tab visible and clickable
NEW: Birth Chart form with name, DOB, time, location fields
NEW: Kundali Milan form with Person 1 and Person 2 sections
NEW: All required data-testid attributes present
Daily/Weekly/Monthly horoscope tabs working
Theme toggle functionality available
Back button navigation available
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor navigation issue: Dashboard URL direct access doesn't always preserve zodiac context. Consider implementing URL-based sign parameter or improving localStorage persistence logic.
